overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit dystopian city at night. The character ascends from an underground stairwell, traverses open plazas with towering holographic advertisements, passes through covered commercial walkways, and navigates narrow alleys with vibrant red and teal neon lighting before emerging onto busy streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairwell leading to urban plaza

events.description: ascending concrete stairs from underground passage toward surface level
emerging from dim stairwell into bright neon-lit plaza environment

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs from underground passage toward the rain-soaked city surface

entered.detail: concrete stairwell with wooden railings leading upward from underground
large pink neon sign reading HOTEL visible at the top of the stairs
tall cylindrical building covered in multiple levels of holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a concrete stairwell from an underground area, with wooden railings on both sides. As they reach the top, the environment opens into a neon-lit urban plaza with a prominent pink HOTEL sign and a massive cylindrical advertising tower visible in the distance against the rainy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic advertisements and police presence

events.description: police vehicle with flashing red emergency lights parked on the right side of the plaza
turning slightly left to navigate around the central plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-slicked plaza surrounded by towering neon advertisements and scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: police car with flashing emergency lights parked near the plaza edge

entered.detail: white police car with flashing red lights parked on the wet plaza tiles
trees with illuminated trunks lining the edge of the plaza
large vertical digital screens displaying advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide-open plaza with wet reflective tiles under the rain. A police vehicle with flashing lights sits to the right while the massive cylindrical ad tower dominates the center view. Pedestrians scatter across the plaza as the character walks past digital billboards and illuminated trees toward the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and pawnshop kiosk

events.description: entering commercial street with ground-level shops and illuminated signage
turning right to follow the curve of the street past parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt street passing by illuminated storefronts and other pedestrians

entered.detail: small booth with illuminated PAWNSHOP signage and glass display windows
row of commercial establishments with bright neon lighting at street level
vehicles parked along the left curb of the street

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open plaza into a medium-width commercial street, the character passes a prominent pawnshop kiosk on the right with bright teal lighting. The wet asphalt reflects the neon signs of various storefronts while parked cars line the left side of the street. The cylindrical ad tower remains visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon-lit shopfronts and vending machines

events.description: entering covered walkway with teal and pink neon lighting overhead
passing arcade machines and vending machines along the covered corridor wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade with glowing teal and pink neon lights reflecting off the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: person standing near the entrance to a neon-lit establishment with pink lighting

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure providing shelter with integrated neon strip lighting
storefronts with bright teal and pink neon illumination lining the walkway
illuminated vending machines and arcade cabinets against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered pedestrian walkway protected from the rain, where teal and pink neon lights create a vibrant atmosphere. Various NPCs stand near shop entrances while vending machines and arcade cabinets line the right wall. The overhead structure blocks most of the sky while reflecting neon glow onto the wet concrete surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with red neon lighting leading to stairwell

events.description: exiting covered walkway into narrow alley with intense red neon lighting
ascending steep concrete stairs toward upper street level

agents.ego_description: walking through the red-lit alley and climbing stairs to reach the upper street level

entered.detail: building facade bathed in intense red neon light with geometric architectural features
steep concrete stairway with metal railings leading upward between buildings
red and white striped construction barriers along the left side of the alley

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the character enters a narrow alley dominated by intense red neon lighting on the left building facade. Red and white barricades line the path as the character approaches and begins ascending a steep concrete stairway. The pink HOTEL sign becomes visible again at the top of the stairs against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city street with crosswalk and commercial signage

events.description: emerging from stairs onto busy street level with vehicle traffic
vehicles passing on the wet street while walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper city street with neon signs and passing vehicles on the wet road

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the wet street with headlights reflecting off the pavement

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing on the wet asphalt street
large illuminated sign reading TENNO on a building facade
commercial buildings with ground floor shops and upper level signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges at street level onto a busy urban road with a yellow crosswalk. The TENNO sign glows pink on a building to the left while vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt. The cylindrical ad tower is visible again in the distance, and various commercial storefronts line the right side of the street as the character continues walking through the neon-lit night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a subterranean ascent into a sprawling, rain-soaked neon metropolis that eventually loops back toward a high-traffic urban street. It begins as the character climbs a concrete stairwell, emerging from the underground into a wide plaza where a massive cylindrical advertising tower and a pink hotel sign pierce the rainy night sky. As the character traverses the reflective tiles of the plaza past flashing police lights, the scene shifts into a commercial street lined with teal-lit kiosks and wet asphalt before transitioning into a semi-covered pedestrian walkway filled with arcade cabinets and glowing vending machines. The camera then follows the character into a narrow alley dominated by intense red neon and barricades, leading up another steep concrete stairway. Finally, the movement culminates as the character emerges onto a busy road with a yellow crosswalk, passing under the pink glow of a Tenno sign while the distant advertising tower remains a constant landmark against the city skyline.
